subject: Re: catherine
body:
don't worry

----- Original Message ----
From: "danars07@aol.com" <danars07@aol.com>
To: jeeproject@yahoo.com
Sent: Thursday, February 1, 2007 9:26:33 AM
Subject: catherine


 Hey,


 


I called Catherine but it just rang to her voicemail so I left her a message.


 


 Jeffrey I am so nervous about the "failure to deliver"
message...the worst thing that could happen is he wouldn't talk to me
anymore, right?
